# Everything in Perspective - Full Index

Canonical Origin: https://einp-js.github.io/

## All Routes

### Gemini and the AI Landscape: Beyond ChatGPT's First-Mover Advantage (Mag)

URL: https://einp-js.github.io//magazine/article/gemini-ai-competition/
Type: article
Description: ChatGPT won the public narrative. But the actual AI competition is far more nuanced—and OpenAI's dominance is fragile. What Gemini, Claude, and others are doing differently.

### Gemini and the AI Landscape: Beyond ChatGPT's First-Mover Advantage (LD)

URL: https://einp-js.github.io//linked-data/article/gemini-ai-competition/
Type: article
Description: ChatGPT won the public narrative. But the actual AI competition is far more nuanced—and OpenAI's dominance is fragile. What Gemini, Claude, and others are doing differently.

### Thinking, Fast and Slow (Mag)

URL: https://einp-js.github.io//magazine/book/thinking-fast-and-slow/
Type: book
Description: Explores the two systems of thought that drive the way we think—System 1, which is fast and intuitive, and System 2, which is slow and deliberate. Kahneman reveals the biases and heuristics that often lead us astray.

### Thinking, Fast and Slow (LD)

URL: https://einp-js.github.io//linked-data/book/thinking-fast-and-slow/
Type: book
Description: Explores the two systems of thought that drive the way we think—System 1, which is fast and intuitive, and System 2, which is slow and deliberate. Kahneman reveals the biases and heuristics that often lead us astray.

### Spanish (Español) (Mag)

URL: https://einp-js.github.io//magazine/language/spanish/
Type: language
Description: Spanish is a Romance language spoken by over 500 million people worldwide, making it the second-most spoken language by number of native speakers. It is the official language of Spain and most countries in Central and South America.

### Spanish (Español) (LD)

URL: https://einp-js.github.io//linked-data/language/spanish/
Type: language
Description: Spanish is a Romance language spoken by over 500 million people worldwide, making it the second-most spoken language by number of native speakers. It is the official language of Spain and most countries in Central and South America.
